creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 214709
patch to update the port

- update 2.32 -> 2.33
Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/TimeDate
- add LICENSE_FILE=${WRKSRC}/README, because it says:
"This library is free software; you can redistribute it and/or modify
it under the same terms as Perl itself."
Thus README does look like license text.

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- Tested with:
12.1-RELEASE-p5 amd64
poudriere 3.3.4
perl 5.30.2
pkg 1.14.4
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
